behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is the handoff between diff extraction and review-input builder (module interaction), not model judgment. REAL-INFRA is not required: a local fixture diff/file pair can reproduce over-inclusion bugs. Rejected System because behavior is about payload scoping before any real HTTP call. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because correctness does not depend on LLM output content or multi-agentic sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real diff parser + input-construction modules with a fixture PR patch and full file contents; assert produced review context includes only changed hunks/lines and excludes unchanged file regions.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: Real failure appears at GitHub API/diff-position semantics boundary (REAL-INFRA + MOCK-HIDE). In-process mocks often accept invalid position mappings that GitHub rejects or reanchors differently. Rejected Integration because the behavior explicitly targets correctness in the real PR diff view.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed positions, then fetch PR review comments from GitHub and verify each lands on the intended file/line in the rendered diff context.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real model judgment/output quality (LLM-DEP). A stubbed model would always pass/fail deterministically and cannot validate defect-finding ability. Rejected Workflow because this behavior is about a single model decision outcome (find a real defect), not multi-agentic stage chaining.
behaviors.test_description: Run analysis with the real model on a seeded PR containing a known bug; assert at least one returned finding correctly matches the known defect class/location.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic state-consistency across local modules (comment-post result store -> summary assembler). Can be caught with module wiring and stubbed returned comment IDs. Rejected System: behavior checks mapping consistency, not GitHub transport semantics. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no dependence on model output quality; IDs are structural linkage.
behaviors.test_description: Execute pipeline stages with fixed findings and stubbed inline-post responses returning IDs; assert every summary entry references an ID that exists in that run’s posted-comment set and no cross-run IDs appear.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: Failure is loss during module handoff/aggregation (inline findings collection -> summary payload builder). Local wiring test catches real drop/merge bugs. Rejected System because posting endpoint behavior is not needed to observe pre-post payload loss. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because this behavior is cardinality/completeness of deterministic payload assembly.
behaviors.test_description: Run aggregation path with multiple inline findings (including edge cases) and verify final summary payload contains all finding IDs/content before post call, preserving count and identity.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires real PR execution and real API interactions across sequence steps (REAL-INFRA). Mocking HTTP can hide auth, ordering, and API contract failures. Rejected Agentic because findings are fixed/precomputed; model output quality is out of scope.
behaviors.test_description: Run the automation end-to-end on a real test PR using a fixed finding fixture; verify diff read succeeds, inline comments are posted, then summary comment is posted with expected references.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This is a full agent pipeline with sequential dependent stages, including real model generation plus downstream posting/orchestration. Failures can arise from agentic output-to-action handoff across steps (MULTI-STEP + LLM-DEP + REAL-INFRA). Rejected Agentic because behavior is not only model quality; it requires end-to-end autonomous sequencing through multiple stages to completion.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the live pipeline on a real PR with real model inference enabled; assert autonomous completion of all stages, successful inline postings, and final summary consistency without operator fixes/retries.
